headline: Apple To $320? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Monday
summary: Top analysts changed outlook on top names: Deutsche Bank cut NKE, Goldman Sachs decr WFC target, Morgan Stanley raised GEV target, Roth Capital cut CSIQ target, Mizuho raised WLK target, Piper Sandler decr KHC target, Stifel incr LUNR target, UBS decr LUV target.

headline: Market's winners & losers last week: Why these 2 sectors stand out
summary: Barron's Investor Circle newsletter editor Josh Schafer sits down with Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland to go over the top winners and losers in the markets (^DJI, ^GSPC, ^IXIC) last week, highlighting two sectors in particular.

headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Buy on Wells Fargo, Lowers Price Target to $93
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Richard Ramsden   maintains Wells Fargo (NYSE:WFC) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $109 to $93.

headline: With Mortgage Rates at a 3-Month High, These Stocks Are Quietly Winning
summary: The 30-year fixed mortgage rate climbed to 6.22% as of March 19, 2026, a three-month high last seen in December of 2025, as the 10-year Treasury yield rose to 4.3% amid broader market unease. Rates had bottomed at 5.98% in late February before climbing steadily through March. The spring housing market is feeling the pressure. ... With Mortgage Rates at a 3-Month High, These Stocks Are Quietly Winning
